vocab.meaning: trải qua một sự thay đổi/biến đổi triệt để
vocab.example: The campus has undergone a radical transformation, evolving from a few modest buildings into a sprawling academic complex.

vocab.meaning: học tập liên ngành (kết hợp nhiều môn học)
vocab.example: Current students benefit from interdisciplinary learning, whereas in my time, subjects were taught in complete isolation.

vocab.meaning: danh mục các hoạt động ngoại khóa
vocab.example: The school has significantly broadened its extracurricular portfolio, offering everything from robotics clubs to competitive debate teams.

vocab.meaning: công tác chăm sóc tâm lý và phúc lợi cho học sinh
vocab.example: There is now a much greater emphasis on pastoral care, with dedicated counselors available to support students' mental health.

vocab.meaning: sự hiện diện ở khắp mọi nơi của công nghệ
vocab.example: The ubiquity of technology is the most striking change; interactive whiteboards have entirely replaced the old chalkboards I remember.
My old school has become a truly multicultural environment, welcoming international students and fostering global perspectives.

vocab.meaning: các sáng kiến thân thiện với môi trường
vocab.example: The school has implemented several eco-friendly initiatives, such as solar panels and a comprehensive recycling program.

vocab.meaning: không gian làm việc nhóm/hợp tác
vocab.example: The traditional rows of desks have been swapped for collaborative workspaces designed to encourage teamwork among peers.

vocab.meaning: kiểm tra đánh giá theo tiêu chuẩn chung
vocab.example: While there is still a focus on standardized testing, the school now uses a more diverse range of assessment methods.
The institution has worked hard to build a robust alumni network to provide career mentorship for graduating students.
